title: Desktop Remote Profile
description: Electron desktop host concern — **Desktop Remote Profile**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Desktop renderer path that talks to a remote `@specd/api` like `specd-studio-web`.
context: Electron desktop host concern — **Desktop Remote Profile**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Desktop renderer path that talks to a remote `@specd/api` like `specd-studio-web`.

rules: When the user connects to a remote API base URL, the renderer MUST use `client:adapter-remote-specd-data` with URL and optional token from connect/recents.

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.name: Undocumented path returns 404
when: client requests a URL outside this routes contract
